request.text: 从前，山顶有一座小庙。庙里住着一个勤快的小和尚，他每天走下山挑水。虽然有点累，水缸却总是满满的。

settings.performancePrompt: 温暖、儒雅、略带童趣，像给孩子讲中国民间故事；吐字清楚，避免过度庄严

request.prompt:
Use case: illustration-story
Asset type: representative 16:9 style sample for a layered Remotion paper-collage children's video
Primary request: an original scene from the Chinese folk tale Three Monks, showing three friendly monks gathered around a large visibly empty water jar in a small mountain-temple courtyard, realizing that nobody fetched water
Scene/backdrop: timeless ancient Chinese mountain temple courtyard, tiled roof, stone steps, distant layered hills and a winding path; no specific dynasty
Subject: three respectful, original cartoon monk designs with clearly different silhouettes — one small and quick, one tall and slender, one round and sturdy — expressive puzzled faces and readable body language; do not imitate any existing film or animation designs
Style/medium: handcrafted Chinese cut-paper collage, layered rice paper and torn paper edges, subtle paper fibers, simple ink-brush accents, separate foreground/midground/background planes suitable for parallax
Composition/framing: wide cinematic landscape, full bodies visible, water jar near the visual center, uncluttered lower safe area for later subtitles
Lighting/mood: warm morning light, playful and gentle, child-friendly, humorous rather than mocking
Color palette: warm ochre, cinnabar red, muted jade green, parchment cream, soft blue-gray mountains
Constraints: coherent perspective, complete hands and feet, respectful Buddhist clothing, original character design, no text, no logo, no watermark, no modern objects, no fire, no fear, no photorealism

request.text: 从前，山顶有一座小庙，住着一个勤快的小和尚。他每天走下山挑水，虽然有点累，水缸却总是满满的。

settings.performancePrompt: 温暖、儒雅、略带童趣，像给孩子讲中国民间故事；吐字清楚，避免过度庄严

request.text: 后来，高和尚也来了。两个人都想省力，争着让水桶离自己远一点。最后，他们用尺子量好，把桶挂在扁担正中，一起抬水。

settings.performancePrompt: 温暖、儒雅、略带童趣；争执部分带一点轻松幽默，吐字清楚，不夸张

request.text: 又过几天，胖和尚来了。三个人都想：别人一定会去挑水。结果谁也不动，水缸很快见了底。

settings.performancePrompt: 温暖说书感，轻微俏皮；最后一句稍作停顿，让孩子听懂推诿的结果

request.text: 一天夜里，老鼠碰倒了油灯，窗帘冒起小小的火苗。三个和尚冲向水缸，却发现里面一滴水也没有。

settings.performancePrompt: 紧张但克制，适合儿童；不要惊悚，火苗和空水缸处强调清楚

request.text: 这回，他们不争了：一个下山打水，一个半路接水，一个留在庙里泼水。三个人来回奔跑，终于把火扑灭。

settings.performancePrompt: 有行动感和节奏感，但保持温暖儒雅；三个分工短句读得清楚有层次

request.text: 第二天，他们装好滑轮和水桶，商量着轮流取水。从此水缸天天满满的。人多不一定力量大；愿意负责、懂得合作，才能把事情做好。

settings.performancePrompt: 温暖、明亮、有收束感；寓意清楚但不说教，结尾自然留一点余韵
